# Foundterra

Foundterra helps pre-seed and seed founders prepare investor-ready pitch decks, financial models, market analysis, and fundraising strategy.

## Main pages

- [Foundterra English](https://www.foundterra.com/)
- [Foundterra Hebrew](https://www.foundterra.com/he)
- [Startup fundraising blog](https://www.foundterra.com/blog)
- [Startup resources](https://www.foundterra.com/resources)

## Free founder tools

- [Pitch Deck Review](https://www.foundterra.com/pitch-review)
- [Deck Architect](https://www.foundterra.com/deck-architect)
- [Startup Financial Model](https://www.foundterra.com/financial-model)
- [Market Size Tool](https://www.foundterra.com/market-size)
- [SaaS Metric Auditor](https://www.foundterra.com/saas-metric-auditor)
- [Investor Readiness Check](https://www.foundterra.com/investor-ready)

## Policies

- [Privacy](https://www.foundterra.com/privacy)
- [Terms](https://www.foundterra.com/terms)
- [Cookies](https://www.foundterra.com/cookies)
